title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.5 - Fix: The Second Lesson no longer errors when an ordered card is replayed (Medley/Da Capo/etc.) - each Order resolves once per turn. Also cleaned up Deceptive Cadence's description. Requires BaseLib.
